subject: How the offer will actually work
preheader: So you're not making the call cold on launch day.
body:
Hi {first_name},

Quick walkthrough so launch day isn't the first time you see the mechanics.

On 22 June 2026 you get an email from me. Subject line will be clear. Inside is the direct Birchal offer link. That's your 24-hour head start. The public list sees it on 23 June.

When you click through on Birchal, you'll see the full offer document. Valuation, financials, business plan, the honest risk section. Minimum investment is $50. Maximum is $10,000 per investor.

You decide how much. You read the document. You complete the investment through Birchal, not through us. Birchal handles the money and the compliance. Your $5 VIP deposit is then either rolled into your investment or refunded if you decide it's not for you.

A few things worth thinking about between now and 22 June.

How much feels sensible. Early-stage investment carries real risk. Don't invest money you need elsewhere. Read the risk section before you commit.

Whether you want to ask a question first. Hit reply and I'll answer it directly before launch day, not after.

That's it. Next email from me is the head-start link on 22 June.

This is not financial advice. Consider seeking independent financial advice. Full details in the disclosure document on Birchal.

Rachel and the FarmThru team
creative_brief: Clean step-by-step layout. Optional numbered list for the three-step investment flow. Plain, procedural tone. No hero image. Soft reply-to CTA only.
